responsibilities: Monitor and rebalance investment portfolios to ensure alignment with target asset allocation and client risk objectives
Conduct performance attribution analysis to explain portfolio returns relative to benchmarks across asset classes and sectors
Build and maintain risk and exposure reports tracking factor tilts, sector concentration, and duration risk across portfolios
Collaborate with portfolio managers to evaluate new investment opportunities and assess their fit within existing mandates
Prepare client-facing performance reports and investment commentary summarizing portfolio positioning and market outlook
Conduct due diligence on external fund managers and investment strategies considered for portfolio inclusion
Analyze portfolio risk metrics including volatility, tracking error, and Value at Risk to support investment decision-making
Support quarterly and annual investment committee reviews with data-driven analysis of portfolio performance and risk
